data.narrative: The student demonstrated outstanding operational awareness, technical communication, and incident planning skills. They designed and documented a comprehensive operations manual with copy-pasteable commands and no placeholders, simulated a container failure to verify their runbook, and corrected configuration drift discrepancies.

dimension_scores.observation: Maintained a secure, multi-stage Alpine Dockerfile with health checks and non-root users. Adjusted docker-compose container names to reflect infrastructure drift.
Designed PR-gated runbook verification checks to prevent manual documentation decay.
dimension_scores.evidence: Runbook update is a required checklist item on every PR that changes infra.

dimension_scores.observation: Exposed liveness, readiness, and Prometheus metrics. Successfully aligned alerts (HighErrorRate, HighLatency) to operational scenarios.
dimension_scores.evidence: Checked active request counts via active_requests and http_request_duration_seconds.

dimension_scores.observation: Conducted simulated connection failures and identified config drift discrepancies. Articulated cascading risks of thundering herds.
dimension_scores.evidence: Simulated DB outage with docker stop linkops-postgres, and checked pg_isready outputs.

dimension_scores.observation: Supported gracefully degrading to direct DB reads on Redis outage and fail-fast 503 circuit-breaking on DB connections.
dimension_scores.evidence: Stated: 'circuit breaker timeout is set to 1000ms' and 'returns a 503 fallback in 3ms'.

dimension_scores.observation: Authored exceptionally clean, copy-pasteable operations manual (docs/service-overview.md) and 3 runbooks. Tested and resolved real command-level discrepancies under simulated failure.
dimension_scores.evidence: Stated: 'each step needs an "if this fails" line' and authored service-overview.md containing precise diagnostic and fix commands.

strengths: High operational maturity in technical writing: authored a complete, copy-pasteable operations manual with exact container references and realistic diagnostic outputs.
Proposed a highly practical hybrid runbook checklist format that includes failure fallbacks at each step to prevent silent on-call blockage.
data.recommendation: In Module 08 (Deploy & Verify), use your runbooks to guide you through the zero-downtime deployment process and verify how they handle deployment-stage health checks.

public_evidence.student_action: Authored the Service Overview manual and three copy-pasteable incident runbooks (Database Connection Failure, Redis Cache Outage, High Latency). Tested the database runbook via simulated outage.
public_evidence.technical_detail: Operational guide and incident runbooks containing exact curl, docker compose, docker inspect, pg_isready, and psql diagnostics.
public_evidence.proof: docs/service-overview.md contains exact container names (linkops-db-postgres) and verified outputs.
public_evidence.ability: Write clear, copy-pasteable operational runbooks and maintain them against infrastructure changes.
public_evidence.reviewer_value: Demonstrates senior-level operational awareness, technical writing, and incident response planning.

concepts_demonstrated.evidence: Distinguished runbooks as action-oriented guides from wikis and proposed adding 'if this fails' steps to linear checklists.
Proposed gating code/infra changes on runbook updates in PR checklists to prevent silent documentation decay.

teaching_approaches.detail: Guided the student to author runbooks and test them against a simulated database failure to uncover config drift.

learning_style_signals: comfortable with security threat modeling conceptually
exhibits strong conceptual depth in system architecture and observability
responds well to concrete failure-mode framing
